name: REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX
description_short: REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX is a credit repair provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 4.9/5 with 756 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX is a Miami-based credit repair and financial services firm serving South Florida's diverse community. The bilingual brand name signals its core focus: delivering credit repair services to both English- and Spanish-speaking clients, a meaningful differentiator in a metro area where a large share of residents navigate financial systems in Spanish as their primary language. With nearly 760 Google reviews averaging 4.9 out of 5, CredFixx has built a substantial local reputation over what appears to be several years of active operation.

Beyond basic credit repair, CredFixx appears to offer a broader suite of financial services. Google categorizes the firm across six subtypes—credit counseling, finance broker, financial consultant, financial institution, financial planner, and loan agency—suggesting clients can access dispute management, credit coaching, loan referrals, and longer-term financial planning under one roof. This breadth can be valuable for consumers who need not just negative items removed from their reports, but also guidance on rebuilding credit proactively and accessing credit products once their scores improve.

Consumers should enter any credit repair engagement with realistic expectations. The Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) governs this industry and requires firms to disclose your rights, provide a written contract, and prohibits charging fees before services are rendered. Before signing, ask CredFixx specifically about their fee structure, estimated timelines, and what types of negative items they dispute. Legitimate credit repair cannot remove accurate, timely information—only errors, unverifiable items, or items that violate reporting rules. Results depend heavily on what's on your individual credit file.

CredFixx's review volume and rating are genuinely strong for a local financial services firm—756 reviews at 4.9 stars suggests a consistent client experience rather than a handful of outliers. The bilingual capability and multi-service model are real advantages for Miami's market. That said, prospective clients should independently verify the firm's licensing status with Florida's Office of Financial Regulation, confirm they receive a written contract before any payment, and approach projected timelines with appropriate skepticism. Credit repair is a legitimate service when practiced ethically, but outcomes are never guaranteed. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptional Google rating of 4.9/5 across 756 reviews, indicating consistent client satisfaction at meaningful scale
Fully bilingual (Spanish/English) services, a significant advantage for Miami's large Hispanic population navigating credit systems
Broad service offering spanning credit counseling, loan brokering, and financial planning—not limited to dispute filing alone
Locally rooted in Miami with apparent multi-year operating history based on review volume
Multi-category financial services mean clients may transition from credit repair to loan access and financial planning with the same firm
High review count reduces the risk of a skewed rating from a small sample—756 reviews carries statistical weight
cons: Pricing and fee structure are not publicly disclosed on the website, requiring a direct consultation to understand costs before committing
Service area appears primarily local to Miami/South Florida, which may limit options for clients outside the area seeking in-person support
As with all credit repair firms, results depend entirely on the contents of your individual credit file—no outcomes can be guaranteed
Google subtypes include 'financial institution,' which is a broad designation and should not be taken to imply FDIC membership or banking licensure
Limited third-party accreditation information is publicly verifiable (e.g., CFPB complaint history, BBB rating), so consumers should conduct their own due diligence
best_for: Consumers in Miami, Florida looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: CredFixx is best suited for Spanish-speaking and bilingual residents of Miami and South Florida who need hands-on, locally available credit repair support and want access to complementary financial services—counseling, loan brokering, and planning—from a single provider. The main caveat is that prospective clients should verify licensing, request a written contract as required by law, and understand that credit repair timelines and outcomes vary based on the specific negative items on their report.
services: Credit report dispute filing and error resolution
Credit counseling and score improvement coaching
Negative item analysis and removal strategy
Loan brokering for personal, auto, and mortgage products
Identity theft recovery and fraudulent account disputes
Secured credit product referrals for credit rebuilding
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
quarantine_reason: Website hacked — serving cialis/spam content. Delisted 2026-04-01.
